booking.title: Book online
booking.agreeTerms: I agree to the salon terms
booking.bookingSuccessText: You'll receive a confirmation by email or WhatsApp.
booking.bookingFailedText: Please try again or contact the salon.
booking.noSlotsAvailable: No times available on this date

payment.notCompletedText: Please try again or contact the salon.
payment.processingBooking: We're processing your appointment. You'll receive a confirmation by email or WhatsApp shortly.
payment.paymentFailedText: The payment was cancelled or not completed. You can try again via your booking link.

afspraak.title: Manage appointment
afspraak.text: This secure management link has been received. Contact the salon if you'd like to change your appointment.

route-contact.title: Directions and contact
route-contact.text: View the salon's contact details or get in touch directly for directions.

salonvoorwaarden.title: Salon terms
salonvoorwaarden.text: Salon terms apply to all appointments, including timely changes or cancellations and any payment arrangements.
bullets: Arrive on time for your appointment.
Change or cancel as early as possible.
Late cancellations may incur a fee.

betaalbewijs.title: Payment receipt
betaalbewijs.text: Your payment receipt is linked to your appointment or order. Keep the email for reference.

abonnement-beheren.title: Manage membership
abonnement-beheren.text: Your membership is linked to the salon. Contact the salon for changes or questions.

review.title: Leave a review
review.text: Thank you for sharing your experience. Your feedback helps the salon improve their service.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
